title: 반향해 연대기 메인 테마
prompt: Create an original instrumental main theme for a story-heavy ocean fantasy RPG. High-fidelity AAA game soundtrack style, not chiptune, no vocals, no copyrighted melody references. Bittersweet wonder, tidal mystery, determined hope. Rich strings, piano, French horns, low percussion, glassy bell textures, subtle maritime pulse. Smooth highs, warm low end, cinematic depth, elegant mix, emotionally memorable, seamless loop feel.

title: 미라진 황혼 허브
prompt: Create an original instrumental background track for an eternal-twilight harbor hub in a fantasy RPG. High-fidelity, cinematic, gentle and melancholy, no vocals, no chiptune, no harsh piercing sounds. Felt piano, soft strings, distant bell, low woodwinds, sea-air ambience, suspended harmony, reflective but playable loop. The mood is a missing dawn, quiet guilt, and fragile resolve.

title: 유리염 사구 탐험
prompt: Create an original instrumental exploration theme for a glass-salt desert where the future has dried out. AAA fantasy RPG soundtrack, lush and immersive, no vocals, no chiptune, no plagiarism. Airy strings, dulcimer-like sparkle, soft frame percussion, low cello, distant pads, subtle rhythmic motion. Lonely horizon, buried memories, survival, mystery, moderate tempo, seamless loop feel.

title: 역항도 카델
prompt: Create an original instrumental city theme for an upside-down gravity-defying port ruled by strict order. High-quality cinematic RPG score, no vocals, no chiptune, no copyrighted similarity. Controlled tension with beauty: plucked pulses, marimba or mallet ostinato, elegant strings, restrained brass, mechanical heartbeat, refined atmosphere. The mood is political pressure, unstable balance, and awe inside a disciplined metropolis.

Heroic but tragic undertone, suitable for regular battles, seamless loop feel.

title: 최종 결전과 엔딩
prompt: Create an original instrumental final boss and ending-credits theme for a mythic ocean fantasy RPG. Begin with immense dark grandeur and evolve toward bittersweet dawn. High-fidelity cinematic score, no vocals, no chiptune, no similarities to known franchises. Massive low strings, brass, deep percussion, tolling bells, then piano and hopeful strings after the climax. Emotional, polished, and suitable for a major ending sequence.
